objectives.title: Production Deploy
objectives.why_it_matters: The entire MVP is verified green (1124 Python tests, 840 frontend tests, E2E 20/20) but sitting in staging. Production deploy is the single remaining step to deliver value to real users.
objectives.evidence: docs/mvp-status.md (98% release ready, staging verified 2026-05-27), DEPLOY.md, HANDOFF-RELEASE.md (semaphore all green)

objectives.title: A11y Hardening (WCAG AA)
objectives.why_it_matters: Sidebar dark mode contrast is 2.4:1 (WCAG AA minimum is 4.5:1). Legal/accessibility risk. Additional issues: h3 without preceding h2 in dashboard, two aside elements lack differentiating aria-label.

objectives.title: Phase 3: Scraping
objectives.why_it_matters: Automated dealer website sync + CarGurus market price extraction. Addresses 'muerte por exito' problem — without scraping, cannot scale beyond ~10 dealers manually.

objectives.title: Phase 4: Leads & Appointments
objectives.why_it_matters: Core MVP flow verified in E2E but needs broader API coverage hardening and SendGrid wiring for email notifications.

objectives.title: Phase 5: Dashboards
objectives.why_it_matters: Role-based dashboards (Admin, Manager, Vendedor, Dealer) with focused metrics per role. Currently no dashboards exist.

objectives.title: Phase 6: Market Intelligence
objectives.why_it_matters: Price benchmarking (own vs. market), segmented price history, market position indicators — the core value proposition for dealers.

objectives.title: Phase 7: Visibility
objectives.why_it_matters: Public catalog for SEO distribution, AI-generated listing titles, social sharing. First external-facing surface after internal operational panel.

objectives.title: Facebook OAuth + Graph API Integration
objectives.why_it_matters: Graph API is the sustainable publishing path. Playwright is the bridge until Graph API is approved.

objectives.title: AI Assistant (Claude Integration)
objectives.why_it_matters: Conversational AI agent for price recommendations and market analysis. Requires sufficient market data first.

done_objectives.title: Phase 13: Frontend — Vehicle Form, DataGrid, CSV Upload
Milestone C: UX Completion
done_objectives.evidence: 8/8 tasks complete (M3, M2, M1, A1, A2, A3, A4, C1)

recommended_next_reason: No dependencies, can start immediately, clear WCAG AA success criteria. After A11y is started, Production Deploy is the critical path.
